assertions.name: json_valid
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed

assertions.name: both_stairs
assertions.description: Floor 5 has both STAIRS_UP and STAIRS_DOWN

assertions.name: entities_on_floor_tiles
assertions.description: All entities are placed on floor tiles (type 1), not walls

assertions.name: mid_level_monsters
assertions.description: Monsters are appropriate for mid-level floor (skeleton, ghost, orc, wizard)

assertions.name: connectivity
assertions.description: All floor tiles are reachable from player_start
